title: Mappacci - Malam Pacar
overview: Happiness colored Tenri's wedding preparations l until the night of her Mappacci's arrival, she fainted when she heard the news that the ship on which Iwan, her future husband, had sunk on the way home. Yasinan's marriage changed. Tenri was depressed to the point of almost losing her life. His mother cried kissing Tenri's face: I don't want to lose you. Since then, Tenri has improved himself and accepted Erwin's  proposal. Tenri feels guilty for Iwan. They were preparing for the wedding, news came that Iwan had been found. Things get complicated, but Tenri tries to keep the Mappacci going.
